title: phyllostegia lantanoides
intro: Phyllostegia lantanoides, also known as Hawaiian shrub lilac, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia lantanoides are said to include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
